inputs.label: Swim Pace
inputs.businessContext: Average swimming time per 100 meters in minutes

inputs.label: Bike Speed
inputs.businessContext: Average cycling speed in kilometers per hour

inputs.label: Run Pace
inputs.businessContext: Average running time per kilometer in minutes

formulas.totalTime: var swim = (inputs.swimDistance / 100) * inputs.swimPace; var bike = (inputs.bikeDistance / inputs.bikeSpeed) * 60; var run = inputs.runDistance * inputs.runPace; var totalMin = swim + bike + run; var h = Math.floor(totalMin / 60); var m = Math.floor(totalMin % 60); var s = Math.round(totalMin % 1 * 60); if (s === 60) { m++; s = 0; } if (m === 60) { h++; m = 0; } return h + ':' + String(m).padStart(2, '0') + ':' + String(s).padStart(2, '0');
